race.comment: BONDI LIFESAVER (6) is first-up today on the back of a trial win at Belmont coming into this. Chris Parnham was on board for that heat and he sticks with the gelding coming into this. Can make an immediate impact. I'M A SOULMAN (5) disappointed on resumption when getting well back at Belmont and never featuring. He had trialled well coming into this campaign though and this looks to shape better. Should be closer to the speed today and a much better run is on the cards. SPELLBORN (3) comes through the same trial as BONDI LIFESAVER and comes into this with just one trial under his belt. Steve Parnham takes the ride and while he has drawn wide, he can make a statement. FORGOTTEN SON (1) has trialled well coming into this and a forward showing is on the cards. WAYFINDER (11) gets Pike on board now and he can improve third-up and out in trip.
